response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s showcases the seaside resort of Miraflores, highlighting its remarkable beauty, from its hidden corners to the elegance of its urban landscape. It boasts a modern bathing establishment built on the seaside at the foot of the iconic cliffs, its layout allowing it to accommodate the hundreds of bathers and distinguished Miraflores families who visit daily. Furthermore, the Peruvian Surfing Club was founded on this beach.
response.title: Mar y playa en Miraflores
